programme.desc: When a proud mother faces her own mortality, she opens up a can of worms that threatens to destroy her relationship with her daughter. Valerie is delighted when Ricky Delaine propositions her, while Rob and Harriet start to bond

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Eighteen contestants remain in the running to win £10,000, including Praveen, Chris, Melanie and Gareth - aware that a wrong answer at any stage will see them knocked out

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley showcases an arresting range of houses to a couple who have a substantial budget of £700,000 and are hoping to relocate their family to the Norfolk countryside. For over half a century, Norfolk has been home to Lotus cars, so while in the county Ginny finds out more about the company heritage before catching a glimpse of the future when their latest hypercar is unveiled

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore, upholsterer Simion Hawtin-Smith and print artist Zoe Murphy breathe new life into a retro swivel chair, a large oak dining table and a once-cherished sideboard

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Radio expert Mark Stuckey has a job on his hands, repairing a 1930s transistor radio brought into the Repair Shop by David Hill from Brecon. The radio was given to David's father by an army officer on the beaches at Dunkirk during the Second World War, and after being successfully shepherded through the bullets and the crashing waves to safety, it became the Hill family's pride and joy. However, the subsequent years have not been kind, with the vintage transistor battered and broken both inside and out. A battered leather gaming case and a grandfather clock with a poignant history are also given a new lease of life

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones hosts the magazine show featuring a mixture of celebrity chat and stories of interest

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Bailey worries she is a burden on Mitch and Karen after overhearing their conversation about money, so she tells them the expenses for the space camp are covered for the winners - to the relief of Mitch. But that's just the start of her plan. Linda confronts Nancy about what she found in her coat, and Honey asks Estelle why the other children are being paid more than Janet. Mila finds herself homeless, and Ben and Callum get bad news about the wedding

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: Self-made millionaires Peter Jones, Deborah Meaden, Touker Suleyman, Tej Lalvani and Sara Davies encounter a Mancunian pair with a dream of sharing music through an app. A husband and wife stand their ground under fierce interrogation over their ethical clothing verification platform, while matters become emotionally charged when an Irish entrepreneur tells the story behind her active shape-wear range - proving even the toughest of Dragons' have a heart. Presented by Evan Davis

programme.title: This Is My House
programme.desc: Four people claim to be an artist called Erica, living with partner Sam in a stylish property in south-east London. Panellists Bill Bailey, Emily Atack, Judi Love, Jamali Maddix and guest Katie Piper are tasked with determining which is the true Erica, as each of the quartet airs their opinion on the real Erica's taste in fashion, her passion for Sam, the story of their wedding day and the name of their plumber. Presented by Stacey Dooley

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers reviews the week's political news, inviting comment and analysis from Stormont and Westminster

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces the weekly topical debate, with a panel of politicians and other guests facing questions from an audience made up of members of the general public

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: Adam Fleming, Laura Kuenssberg and Chris Mason present their weekly round-up from Westminster, delivering their usual mix of serious analysis and light-hearted gossip about the biggest stories in politics

programme.title: Greta Thunberg: A Year to Change the World
programme.desc: The Covid-19 pandemic reveals the enormity of the challenge that climate change poses, as the drop in emissions during lockdown proves far from enough to get the world back on track. She explores new measures to reduce the level of emissions further, visiting a tree plantation and learning about a machine that sucks carbon dioxide out of the air. She also explains the everyday choices that members of the public can make to reduce their environmental impact

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander, Martel Maxwell and Dion Dublin visit properties in Peckham, south-east London, Bilston near Wolverhampton, and a flat in Maidstone

programme.title: Dom Digs In
programme.desc: Dom Littlewood works with one of the UK's biggest water companies. He traces the flow of this precious resource from the reservoir to homes and businesses, before finding out what happens with wastewater at the other end of the system

programme.title: Paramedics on Scene
programme.desc: In Paisley, a young cyclist has his bike ride cut short after a tangle with his chain leaves him with a gash in his leg. He's full of bravado, but badly injured. Nearby, an elderly lady with breathing problems needs to be treated and carefully transferred to hospital

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp presents from Oswestry Showground in Shropshire, with experts Kate Bliss and Ben Cooper. Before the reds and blues' chosen items go under the hammer, Charles Hanson auctions off a rare Chinese treasure that was discovered inside a carrier bag on its way to a charity shop

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts the quiz in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single 'impossible' answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: Home Is Where the Art Is
programme.desc: Nick Knowles challenges artists to make something amazing for the homes of people they've never met. In Birmingham, a buyer who was born on the weekend of the first moon landings seeks to mark her 50th year with something 'out of this world'

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman heads to Shropshire and Herefordshire to help a recently retired couple with a £550,000 budget find a dream country home that is full of traditional period charm. Nicki also visits the Weston Park Model Air Show

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jacqui Joseph is at the Walsall Recycling Centre, where she digs out a bamboo chair uncovered from some garden waste, an unwanted pine corner unit, and a mid-century bedside table

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Steve Fletcher is thrilled to find himself working on a remarkable, quirky train set designed and built by celebrated cartoonist and innovator Rowland Emmet, the man behind the inventions in Chitty Chitty Bang Bang. A sailor's trinket box and a doll also receive some much-needed attention

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones rounds off the working week, introducing the usual mix of celebrity guests and stories about people in extraordinary circumstances

programme.title: Royal Wedding: A Day to Remember
programme.desc: A look back at the wedding of Prince William and Catherine Middleton, to mark their 10th anniversary. The event was staged at Westminster Abbey on April 29, 2011 and then-Archbishop of Canterbury Rowan Williams conducted the marriage. Around 1,900 people attended the ceremony, which was followed by a luncheon reception at Buckingham Palace

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Mitch gets a shock when he goes to wake Bailey. Keegan and Tiffany are nervous ahead of their meeting with the bank manager. Honey threatens Billy that she will cancel Janet's photo shoot if he does not resolve her pay issues with Estelle

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong guest hosts, inviting comedian Joe Lycett and journalist Kirsty Wark to join regular team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the week's headlines

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Now the main man on BBC magazine show This Time, Alan is relishing his career Indian summer. However, conscious of being left in the shadow of co-presenter Jennie and alert to potential changes behind the scenes, he grows ever more anxious about his place in the big time. Return of the media-based comedy, starring Steve Coogan, with Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Colin Murphy, Diona Doherty and Neil Delamere satirise and lampoon the people and events which have been making the news in Northern Ireland and further afield. Alongside comedian and quiz expert Paul Sinha, the team fields questions from a virtual audience who will undoubtedly want them to wag the finger of blame at someone. Hosted by Tim McGarry

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The second of two compilations of highlights from the recent series, featuring appearances by Tom Cruise, Rebel Wilson, Rege-Jean Page, Rosamund Pike, Tom Jones, Keeley Hawes, Ian Wright, Sienna Miller, Sam Neill, Kate Winslet, Alan Carr, Felicity Kendal, Adrian Lester, Amy Poehler, Daniel Kaluuya, Jennifer Garner, Stanley Tucci, Cush Jumbo, Liam Neeson, Octavia Spencer, Melissa McCarthy and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Blair Witch Project (1999)
programme.desc: Three film students head into the American backwoods to make a documentary about the fabled Blair Witch. There proves to be more to the urban legend than meets the eye, and as night falls they find themselves in very real danger. Horror, presented as camcorder footage shot by the characters during their investigation, starring Heather Donahue, Michael Williams and Joshua Leonard

programme.title: Our World
programme.desc: Under cover of Covid, the Amazon rainforest is under attack. Deforestation is at levels not seen for more than a decade. Brazil's president, Jair Bolsonaro, talks of opening the forest up to development while the environmental police are under attack from loggers. Our World has obtained a recording of the environment minister talking about using the cover of Covid to 'change all the rules' in the Amazon. Justin Rowlatt goes on a mission to find out how a tribe he visited a decade ago is faring in the face of this assault.

programme.title: Sar-sgeoil: Outlander
programme.desc: Cathy MacDonald explores the locations, folklore and history that inspired Diana Gabaldon's hugely successful Outlander, outlining the facts behind the fiction that has brought fans flocking to Scotland from across the globe

programme.title: Mach à Seo!

programme.title: Of Diabolical Purpose - Sgeulachd Monsieur Chantrelle
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions and expert opinion, John Morrison revisits the story of Eugene Chantrelle, a French teacher hanged for murdering his wife in Edinburgh in 1878. A gifted linguist with medical knowledge, he frequently threatened to poison his wife - and was accused of so doing upon her death. Chantrelle pleaded his innocence up to the moment he was hanged and the evidence against him was circumstancial - and his great-grandson speaks of the lasting damage caused to the family

programme.title: Sgeulachd Deacon Brodie
programme.desc: John Morrison explores the life of Edinburgh-born William Brodie, whose criminal dealings and double identity is believed to have inspired Robert Louis Stevenson's character Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde. The presenter investigates why the ambiguous man who was hanged for his affairs in 1889 is still regarded with affection in the Scottish capital, with the help of expert opinion and drama reconstruction

programme.title: Seòid a' Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programme.desc: The lads contemplate winter and come up with heart-warming comfort foods. Ruairidh cooks red cabbage and a lamb hotpot with mint sauce, and Uisdean prepares a mutton chump roast

programme.title: Bana-Churaidhean/Warrior Women
programme.desc: Recreating the life of a village chief's daughter - Sukeoun - in 19th-century Africa

programme.title: Dhan Uisge
programme.desc: Calum Maclean enjoys a ramble on the Clisham on Harris, then goes swimming in Loch Mhisteam

programme.title: Mach à Seo!
programme.desc: Ramsay MacMahon follows in Rob Roy's footsteps in Stirlingshire's hills and glens. Starting in Callander, the walk takes Ramsay to Samson's Stone

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Leugh le Linda
programme.desc: Linda Macleod travels to Benbecula where she reads Oidhche Mhath, Sam with nursery school pupils

programme.title: 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam (I'm a Fish)
programme.desc: The Sheepshead Fish is very sneaky – they can eat pretty much anything as they have very sharp teeth and can steal the bait off fishing hooks, without getting caught

programme.title: Creag nam Buthaidean (Puffin Rock)
programme.desc: Baba proves that he is now as capable as his older sister and friends when he helps rescue a baby seagull that has got caught up in some fishing twine on the beach

programme.title: Padraig Post: Seirbheis Deis agus Sonraichte
programme.desc: The long-serving mailman feels a bit nervous wheb asked to transport a very important guest - the Duchess

programme.title: Nannag a' Noo/Huggleboo
programme.desc: A new family is moving into the flat, a mother and her son named Zizou. Perhaps he would like to become friends with Huggleboo

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: Angela Mackay reads Air Mo Shlighe Dhan Amar by Sarah Maizes, illustrated by Michael Paraskevas and translated into Gaelic by Jo Macdonald

programme.title: Aithne air Ainmhidhean (All About Animals)
programme.desc: The story of a newborn vervet monkey called Viva, who lives with her troop on a golf course in Durban, South Africa

programme.title: An Rud As Fheàrr Leam
programme.desc: Annie from Glasgow shares her favourite hobbies, which include botany, playing the harp and Munro-bagging

programme.title: Na Moomins/Moomin Valley
programme.desc: In his new play, Papà Mùman tells of his adventures as a young Mùman

programme.title: An Là (News)
programme.desc: Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA

programme.title: Fraochy Bay
programme.desc: A ratings war is declared as two pirate radio stations battle it out to win listeners in Fraochy Bay

programme.title: Machair
programme.desc: Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis

programme.title: Earrann Eachdraidh (History Shorts)
programme.desc: Winter sports, including ski jumps, bob sleds and motor skiing

programme.title: Tir is Teanga (Language and Landscape)
programme.desc: Colin MacLeod travels to North Uist, where he explores the island's treacherous coastline and climbs its highest hill as he continues to investigate the history of place names in the Highlands

programme.title: Dealbhan Fraoich (Heather's Portraits)
programme.desc: Heather Dewar visits Edinburgh, where she draws a portrait of Iagan MacNeil, who has forged a successful career in the media - as journalist, newsreader and in public relations

programme.title: Feis Rois
programme.desc: Lauren MacColl performs her album The Seer at Strathpeffer Pavilion in April 2021 accompanied by Rachel Newton, Megan Henderson, Anna Massie, Mairearad Green and Signy Jakobsdottir

programme.title: Eadar na Dha: 1918-1935/Clash of Futures: 1918-1935
programme.desc: The Great War is finally over and a new era is about to start. Amidst the grief, disappointment and old fears, new dreams and hopes are now emerging but so too are new hatreds

programme.title: Dhan Uisge
programme.desc: Calum Maclean enjoys a ramble on the Clisham on Harris, then goes swimming in Loch Mhisteam

programme.title: Opry an Iúir
programme.desc: Daniel O'Donnell hosts the Irish-language country music show from the Town Hall in Newry, with Jim Devine and his special guest Maighréad Ní Dhomhnaill taking to the stage

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Good Morning Britain

programme.desc: Another helping of topical studio discussion from a female perspective, featuring celebrity interviews

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Cameras follow criminal barrister Robert Rinder as he takes on real-life cases in a studio courtroom

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: A team of family and friends compete in the game show, taking it in turns to find the answers to top 10 lists, before trying to score a perfect 10 in the final round. Hosted by Sally Lindsay

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Alan, Laura, Kerry and Enyioma pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.desc: By UKIP

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sharon helps Sarah to throw Sam a birthday party. Asha enjoys living with Corey. Carla and Peter take advantage of an empty house

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: The comedian follows the work of Battersea Dogs & Cats Home in London, meeting staff involved in treating, training and rehoming animals. This time, Paul meets a pair of shih tzus from a puppy farm that need to learn all about domestic life, and an American bulldog struggling to cope without its owner. Later, he is introduced to a stray that has been living at Battersea for two years

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sam takes Sharon into his confidence. Peter receives great news about his transplant. Kevin and Abi are shocked at Tyrone's presumption

programme.desc: Martin goes on a mission to dig deeper into Carl Tuckman's murky past, hoping to find clues that may relate to Gemma's disappearance. Crime drama, starring Noel Clarke, Bronagh Waugh and Alexandra Roach

programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Peston
programme.desc: Political magazine show presented by Robert Peston, featuring major interviews with MPs, topical guests and cultural figures. Including updates from social media taking in perspectives from viewers, experts and key players throughout the programme

programme.title: After the Storm: America's Enemy Within?
programme.desc: Robert Moore travels across the United States to track down the perpetrators he encountered while filming during the storming of the US Capitol by a mob in January. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Nicky, Kate, Guy and Jules pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola pleads with Jimmy, Liam reassures Tracy, and Moira is suspicious

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sharon gives Sam a message to pass to Nick. Eileen berates George for dismissing Todd. Simon breaks cover to visit his dad

programme.title: Tonight
programme.desc: Former MP Tom Watson investigates how much damage sugar is doing to the nation's health, and the potential links between Covid and obesity

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Peter gets caught in the crossfire of Simon's escape. Todd receives a poignant reminder of his past. Tyrone accuses Kevin and Abi of snubbing Alina

programme.title: Viewpoint
programme.desc: Martin prepares Carl to confront Kate in the hopes of a confession, but the surveillance operation takes an unexpected turn, leading to devastating consequences. Manchester primary school teacher Gemma Hillman goes missing and DCs Martin Young and Stella Beckett are given the task of putting her boyfriend - the prime suspect - under surveillance. Crime drama, starring Noel Clarke and Bronagh Waugh

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Alan Carr's Epic Gameshow
programme.desc: The comedian hosts an updated version of Name That Tune, with four contestants trying to identify songs played by a house band in the shortest time possible and have a chance at winning the £25,000 jackpot. Singer Sophie Ellis-Bextor makes a guest appearance at the piano for the Bid-a-Note round, where contestants go head to head to name the tune in as few notes as possible

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show
programme.desc: The host welcomes Culture Club frontman Boy George, Great British Bake Off judge Prue Leith, rapper-turned-chef Big Zuu and comedian Joanne McNally to the sofa, while indie-pop band London Grammar chat and perform in the studio

programme.title: Bob's Burgers

programme.desc: Ned pleads with Roy not to marry Kelly. Tricia is determined that Bernice will not get her hands on the Woolpack. Frankie thanks Zoe for her help and asks her out for a drink

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A murder victim is found in unusual circumstances, buried with a cache of 100-year-old timber. A likely suspect is soon identified, only to be shot dead by a mystery assassin - a development that has repercussions for DI Lane's love life. Jack Shepherd stars as the dour Cornish copper, with Helen Masters

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Emily finds out she is pregnant, but the joy is tempered by ill-feeling from the Jacobs family over the death of their father, who was run over by a tractor. Meanwhile, Kate enjoys peculiar cravings. Sixties-based drama, starring Nick Berry

programme.desc: Viv feels embarrassed about making a pass at Richie. Roy and Kelly's wedding day arrives. Kelly worries that Scott will disrupt the wedding

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Spider and Emily organise a demonstration outside the law courts. Angie rows with Mike. Zoe is fed up of having Shannon around her all the time. Les enjoys having his son around

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Judy enjoys looking after Shannon. Alma gives Mike an ultimatum. Deirdre is sent to see the prison psychiatrist. Mary Docherty approaches Ken with information about Jon

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When Grace Phillips is killed in an explosion in a munitions factory, Foyle is asked by one of her co-workers to investigate the death. Initially he concludes a tragic accident has occurred until another woman is found murdered and Foyle starts to believe the deaths are connected. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Kersey and Lane investigate the death of a fisherman, who was killed while at sea, and find EC quotas are taking their toll in more ways than one. They also discover a new sense of rivalry in their working relationship, but a bit of healthy competition could give them the edge they need to solve the case. Jack Shepherd stars, with Jimmy Yuill and Helen Masters

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective investigates the disappearance of a Dutch au pair, which seems connected to rivalry amid the city's academics. His search leads him to a family estate in the Oxfordshire countryside where he meets three siblings divided by personal demons and shared loss. Endeavour suspects there is a link between the disappearance and an unsolved case from years before, but as the investigation continues, conflict erupts between his fellow officers. When a group of teenagers makes a horrifying discovery, he suspects someone is manipulating events from afar

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A murder inquiry is launched when the police are alerted to shocking internet footage showing a teenage girl being attacked and shot. The investigation is hindered by the lack of a body, but the video provides enough clues to eventually put a name to the victim and track down her killers. However, a vow of silence between the defendants means Jake and Alesha face one of their toughest court battles yet

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Bancroft is faced with a blast from the past that brings events from 1990 to the surface, and Katherine wrestles with new information that she is uncovering. Elsewhere, Daanish fulfils his part of the deal, and Anya makes a surprising visits to an old friend. Starring Sarah Parish, Faye Marsay and Amara Karan

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The surly detective tries to get out of attending a reunion of George Cross holders because a serial rapist has struck again on his patch. Righteous indignation prompts him to take the most desperate professional gamble of his entire career by using PC Hazel Wallace as bait in a trap. He eventually picks up a lead involving the most recent victim's father, but comes under pressure from within the force to back down or be thrown off the case. David Jason stars

programme.desc: The detective's god-daughter Lydia and her son James - who is severely traumatised by a bombing at his school - come to stay unexpectedly. Struggling to look after the lad when his mother goes missing, Foyle's life suffers a further complication when the body of a local man is found near a military centre - leading him into the top-secret world of weapons research. Kate Fleetwood and Michael Jayston guest star, with Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A psychiatrist's wife is murdered in a seemingly unprovoked attack, and establishing a motive proves harder than catching the killer. Meanwhile, Lane and Kersey disagree at every turn of the investigation. Jack Shepherd stars as the dour detective

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A college dean is found bludgeoned to death in local woodland, following a heated pub debate. When an alchemic image is discovered by the body, denoting the first of four stages of a process called 'The Magnum Opus', the detectives realise that there are three more murders to follow. Before any more crimes are committed, the team must uncover the guilty secret that the victims share in order to learn the identity of the killer and the potential victims

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team tries to juggle three cases over the course of one day, beginning at 6am when Brooks and Casey are called to a crime scene where a barman has been shot dead in his car. Then, a family dispute leads to murder, and the frenetic morning takes an unexpected turn when an allegation of police intimidation is made against one of the officers. Bradley Walsh and Paul Nicholls star

programme.desc: Katherine and Anya make a determined push to get to the bottom of the Laura Fraser case once and for all, hatching a plan to get the DNA evidence they desperately need. Thriller, starring Sarah Parish, Faye Marsay and Amara Khan

programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Down's syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike warns Alma not to lecture him on the sanctity of marriage. Leanne is amazed to hear she has a half-brother. Ashley worries about Shannon coughing and wheezing

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ned pleads with Roy not to marry Kelly. Tricia is determined that Bernice will not get her hands on the Woolpack. Frankie thanks Zoe for her help and asks her out for a drink

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Roy and Kelly plan their stag and hen nights. Zoe prepares a romantic meal for Frankie. Roy goes missing at his stag night so the gents crash Kelly's hen night instead

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick and Kate receive plenty of advice from the locals when their marriage runs into trouble and Greengrass becomes the main suspect for lead theft

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Mollie Sugden as a hired-help who finds her long-lost son

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Blakey organises an exhibition as the bus company celebrates its half-centenary. Stan reminisces, and on falling asleep finds himself at the wheel of a bus from the turn of the 20th century. Comedy. starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A murder victim is found in unusual circumstances, buried with a cache of 100-year-old timber. A likely suspect is soon identified, only to be shot dead by a mystery assassin - a development that has repercussions for DI Lane's love life. Jack Shepherd stars as the dour Cornish copper, with Helen Masters

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Emily finds out she is pregnant, but the joy is tempered by ill-feeling from the Jacobs family over the death of their father, who was run over by a tractor. Meanwhile, Kate enjoys peculiar cravings. Sixties-based drama, starring Nick Berry

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv feels embarrassed about making a pass at Richie. Roy and Kelly's wedding day arrives. Kelly worries that Scott will disrupt the wedding

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly explains to Roy why she is unhappy. The schoolchildren hold a tree-planting ceremony for Rachel. Roy begs Chris to pay for a honeymoon for them

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Spider and Emily organise a demonstration outside the law courts. Angie rows with Mike. Zoe is fed up of having Shannon around her all the time. Les enjoys having his son around

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Judy enjoys looking after Shannon. Alma gives Mike an ultimatum. Deirdre is sent to see the prison psychiatrist. Mary Docherty approaches Ken with information about Jon

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When Grace Phillips is killed in an explosion in a munitions factory, Foyle is asked by one of her co-workers to investigate the death. Initially he concludes a tragic accident has occurred until another woman is found murdered and Foyle starts to believe the deaths are connected. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Kersey and Lane investigate the death of a fisherman, who was killed while at sea, and find EC quotas are taking their toll in more ways than one. They also discover a new sense of rivalry in their working relationship, but a bit of healthy competition could give them the edge they need to solve the case. Jack Shepherd stars, with Jimmy Yuill and Helen Masters

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective investigates the disappearance of a Dutch au pair, which seems connected to rivalry amid the city's academics. His search leads him to a family estate in the Oxfordshire countryside where he meets three siblings divided by personal demons and shared loss. Endeavour suspects there is a link between the disappearance and an unsolved case from years before, but as the investigation continues, conflict erupts between his fellow officers. When a group of teenagers makes a horrifying discovery, he suspects someone is manipulating events from afar

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A murder inquiry is launched when the police are alerted to shocking internet footage showing a teenage girl being attacked and shot. The investigation is hindered by the lack of a body, but the video provides enough clues to eventually put a name to the victim and track down her killers. However, a vow of silence between the defendants means Jake and Alesha face one of their toughest court battles yet

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Detective Superintendent Bancroft is faced with a blast from the past that brings events from 1990 to the surface, and Katherine wrestles with new information that she is uncovering. Elsewhere, Daanish fulfils his part of the deal, and Anya makes a surprising visits to an old friend. Starring Sarah Parish, Faye Marsay and Amara Karan

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The surly detective tries to get out of attending a reunion of George Cross holders because a serial rapist has struck again on his patch. Righteous indignation prompts him to take the most desperate professional gamble of his entire career by using PC Hazel Wallace as bait in a trap. He eventually picks up a lead involving the most recent victim's father, but comes under pressure from within the force to back down or be thrown off the case. David Jason stars

programme.desc: Butch asks Mandy's advice about fancying people. Kelly and Roy return from Paris and give Chris the bill. Kathy stands Biff up to see Graham

programme.desc: Mary tells Ken she wants to help put Jon behind bars. Deirdre cannot cope with being put in the prison hospital. Greg is attracted to Maxine and introduces himself to her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine stays out all night clubbing with Greg. Mike tells Deirdre about Jon's bigamous marriage. Natalie is annoyed when Des makes it clear he is interested in her

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's god-daughter Lydia and her son James - who is severely traumatised by a bombing at his school - come to stay unexpectedly. Struggling to look after the lad when his mother goes missing, Foyle's life suffers a further complication when the body of a local man is found near a military centre - leading him into the top-secret world of weapons research. Kate Fleetwood and Michael Jayston guest star, with Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A psychiatrist's wife is murdered in a seemingly unprovoked attack, and establishing a motive proves harder than catching the killer. Meanwhile, Lane and Kersey disagree at every turn of the investigation. Jack Shepherd stars as the dour detective

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A college dean is found bludgeoned to death in local woodland, following a heated pub debate. When an alchemic image is discovered by the body, denoting the first of four stages of a process called 'The Magnum Opus', the detectives realise that there are three more murders to follow. Before any more crimes are committed, the team must uncover the guilty secret that the victims share in order to learn the identity of the killer and the potential victims

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team tries to juggle three cases over the course of one day, beginning at 6am when Brooks and Casey are called to a crime scene where a barman has been shot dead in his car. Then, a family dispute leads to murder, and the frenetic morning takes an unexpected turn when an allegation of police intimidation is made against one of the officers. Bradley Walsh and Paul Nicholls star

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Katherine and Anya make a determined push to get to the bottom of the Laura Fraser case once and for all, hatching a plan to get the DNA evidence they desperately need. Bancroft executes a massive sting operation against Athif Kamara, but things do not run smoothly and she is forced to reveal carefully kept secrets about her past. Thriller, starring Sarah Parish, Faye Marsay and Amara Khan

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Down's syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: The sheriff captures Much the miller's son and threatens to hang him, and an ageing outlaw kidnap's the tyrant's nephew. Drama, starring Jason Coney

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: An engineer hatches a plan to immortalise people by freezing them and bringing them back to life, and decides Simon Templar would make the ideal guinea pig

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Jim reveals his gentler side when Harriet's friend is found murdered, but the case is clouded when the victim's vengeful father gets in the way. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is given a deadly new rifle for testing, but the weapon is promptly stolen. To make matters worse, he discovers he is being stalked by an old friend who has embarked on a vendetta. Vicki Michelle ('Allo 'Allo!) makes an early screen appearance, alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Crooked travel agent Monty Wiseman persuades Arthur to agree to pick up a coffin at Heathrow airport and store it in the lock-up. However when a coroner's autopsy is ordered, Monty stashes it in a disgruntled Terry's bedroom for safekeeping leading to suspicions that there is more to the corpse than meets the eye. Suzi Quatro and Derek Fowlds guest star, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Tom Dove and Neil Spooner at the renowned Gigantica Lakes complex in the Champagne region of France, hoping to hook a huge fish

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: King John angers former queen Hadwisa by taking a new bride. The Sheriff is confined to bed after being bitten by his dog, leaving Gisburne free to meddle

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked by the former king of Fedyra to accompany him on an important mission in Switzerland, where he becomes aide to a queen

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The detective duo investigate a series of attacks on a giant corporation by a mysterious terrorist group, and uncover a shocking secret

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The brother of a suspected drug-dealer dies while in custody, and his elder sibling directs his powerful lawyer to instigate a committee to investigate CI5's involvement. With the future of the division in question, Bodie and Doyle try to prove the family's drug-trade connection and the real reason behind the man's death. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: News of a violent attack in a remote Mongolian river has Jeremy Wade wondering if it could be the work of a giant fish so rare that it's more legend than fact. But with illegal gold miners poisoning the last hideouts of this man-sized monster, it's anyone's guess whether the creature is still alive and biting

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Neil Spooner and Tom Dove travel to Thailand, where they have previously caught huge Siamese carp, but this time the focus is on the other species of carp found there. Their adventure is split between Fishing Park Samui and Gillhams Fishing Resorts, where they will have to use all of their skill and knowledge to outwit as many different carp species as possible, and in the process they will be hoping to bank one of the stunning Jullien's golden carp that can be found there

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: TV presenter Fern Britton, former England cricketer Matthew Hoggard, lingerie tycoon Michelle Mone and actor Neil Morrissey pit their general knowledge against a trivia expert as they try to win thousands of pounds for charity. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The third round of the season sees Croatia make its debut in the calendar, as a mix of asphalt and some bumpy surfaces challenge drivers on fast, but often very narrow roads

programme.title: The Fugitive (1993)
programme.desc: A doctor is convicted of his wife's murder and forced to go on the run to prove his innocence - but his efforts to find the mysterious one-armed man he believes is the real killer are hampered by a tenacious US marshal. Thriller, starring Harrison Ford, an Oscar-winning Tommy Lee Jones, Sela Ward, Julianne Moore and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robert's father is arrested for treason and sentenced to death. The outlaws try to rescue him, but they too are captured. Fortunately, help is at hand in the form of a reclusive old woman suspected of being a witch - and her pet pig Rutterkin

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar visits Venice to save a damsel in distress - only to find himself plunged headlong into a seedy underworld of gangsters, intrigue and deadly revenge. Roger Moore plays the suave secret agent, with William Sylvester, Patrick Troughton and Lois Maxwell

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Harriet poses as a journalist in an attempt to track a notorious criminal trying to muscle in on London's organised crime scene, and soon becomes embroiled in the machinations of a crafty French jewel thief. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An Israeli minister is abducted, and the ensuing suburban siege triggers an airborne pursuit as Bodie and Doyle try to save the day. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry injures his hand helping Des, and Arthur's stand-in sidekick gets him mixed up in a heroin deal. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Mike Reid and George Layton, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team travel to a venue in Hungary that has produced carp weighing more than 40kg in the past. However, they quickly discover it shares a common problem with many lakes in this part of the world - there are also hordes of hungry smaller carp under 20lb

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Meera Syal (The Kumars), fashion designer David Emanuel, former England rugby player Kyran Bracken and comedian Johnny Vegas compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at the mega-factory supplying Pimm's to the world, and a look at the team of craftsmen and woman who make sure the Household Cavalry look their best when on parade. Plus, how a jungle vine is turned into a world class polo mallet, and the street lights that are made to weather any storm

programme.title: The Spy Who Loved Me (1977)
programme.desc: James Bond teams up with a KGB agent to recover missing British and Soviet nuclear submarines, before whoever stole them can use their warheads. Unfortunately, 007 was responsible for the death of his new ally's lover - and she is determined to make him pay before their mission is complete. Spy adventure, starring Roger Moore, Barbara Bach, Curt Jurgens and Richard Kiel

programme.title: Bullitt (1968)
programme.desc: A tough police detective is assigned to protect a Mob witness for 48 hours, only for hitmen to find their hiding place and try to silence the informant. The rebellious cop realises something does not add up and goes in search of both the killers and whoever told them where to locate their target - but an ambitious politician wants him off the case. Thriller, starring Steve McQueen, Jacqueline Bisset, Robert Vaughn and Robert Duvall

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked by the former king of Fedyra to accompany him on an important mission in Switzerland, where he becomes aide to a queen

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The detective duo investigate a series of attacks on a giant corporation by a mysterious terrorist group, and uncover a shocking secret

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The brother of a suspected drug-dealer dies while in custody, and his elder sibling directs his powerful lawyer to instigate a committee to investigate CI5's involvement. With the future of the division in question, Bodie and Doyle try to prove the family's drug-trade connection and the real reason behind the man's death. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: News of a violent attack in a remote Mongolian river has Jeremy Wade wondering if it could be the work of a giant fish so rare that it's more legend than fact. But with illegal gold miners poisoning the last hideouts of this man-sized monster, it's anyone's guess whether the creature is still alive and biting

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Neil Spooner and Tom Dove travel to Thailand, where they have previously caught huge Siamese carp, but this time the focus is on the other species of carp found there. Their adventure is split between Fishing Park Samui and Gillhams Fishing Resorts, where they will have to use all of their skill and knowledge to outwit as many different carp species as possible, and in the process they will be hoping to bank one of the stunning Jullien's golden carp that can be found there

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: TV presenter Fern Britton, former England cricketer Matthew Hoggard, lingerie tycoon Michelle Mone and actor Neil Morrissey pit their general knowledge against a trivia expert as they try to win thousands of pounds for charity. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The third round of the season sees Croatia make its debut in the calendar, as a mix of asphalt and some bumpy surfaces challenge drivers on fast, but often very narrow roads

programme.desc: The ninjas return to the Island of the Keepers to warn them of Kalmaar's plan - they convince the Leader to allow them to take the Storm Amulet to Ninjago City for safekeeping but discover that the amulet is a fake! Becky's unborn baby has a rare lung tumour that is growing rapidly, Ann-Marie is carrying identical twins, one of which has selective growth restriction jeopardising both baby's chances of surviving, and Randika's dwarfism makes giving birth a difficult proposition

programme.title: Kirstie: Keep Crafting and Carry On

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Davina McCall is joined by Steve and Carole, a grandmother and grandson from Braintree, and Mehmet and Katrina, a couple from Birmingham

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of three. Marie and Debra's feud continues, so Ray and Frank use it to their advantage, while Robert tries to get the warring pair to make friends. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra accuses Ray of still not being able to read her moods, prompting them to reminisce fondly about the first night they spent together. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Charlotte accepts a lift to the railway station from Frasier, but his car breaks down in a desolate area and they end up spending the night in the same room as a dead body. Meanwhile, confusion arises as Niles plans Martin's stag party

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink considers throwing away an old broken pot until it stirs up fond memories, including the time he was accidentally glued to a blind date and a Thanksgiving when everyone seemed to be down on their luck. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Frasier's final dinner with Charlotte is ruined by constant interruptions, Martin and Ronee's wedding day is marked by a series of calamities, and Daphne goes into labour at a veterinary practice. Jason Biggs, Robbie Coltrane and Richard E Grant guest star alongside regulars Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney in the series' penultimate episode

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick visits Stephanie to check out the new boiler for her mum's apartment - but it's bad news and mum Isobel is not happy. Justin and Annabelle must get busy to complete rooms in time for a visit from Justin's 95-year-old grandmother. Jayne and Steve battle with a giant four poster bed for the master en suite bedroom, but with a little help from some friends, manage to complete another room

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: n the West Country, three rival couples compete to host the best dinner party. On the first night, handyman Sam and his wife Kate attempt a restaurant quality meal. On night two, proud Somerset pair Colin and Kate host at their family farm and serve pork sourced from Colin's brother's pig farm. On the final night, festival lovers Aron and Kath put on a beach-themed dinner party, and although they are confident about their culinary prowess, disaster strikes on not one, but two courses. The rest of their meal comes together well, but is it enough to bag the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the long-running words-and-numbers game, as food critic Jay Rayner joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carol longs to buy a holiday home for her and her husband on the island of Lanzarote that will work for all four generations of their family. She particularly loves the east coast, with its buzzing resorts of Costa Teguise and Puerto del Carmen, and is looking for a town house or apartment with a pool and a view from the terrace. With a budget of £150,000 - and Carol's daughter-in-law-Donna coming along to help - Jasmine Harman sets out to find a property to please everyone

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Road Trip
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix meets more Brits who have set up lives abroad. In the medieval towns of south-west France, an ale lover tries to persuade the wine-loving French to drink British beer, a chef and his partner launches a new restaurant and a former shoe designer finishes off a renovation project started by her late father

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Fiancees and live-in landlords Paul Wright and Dave McDermott welcome their rivals to the Coach and Horses in Compton in West Sussex, where they hope that their touch of country class will be the cream of the crop. When the guests arrive, Hannah and Ibrahim drink it all in, but the decor comes up short for Matt and Rich and a bad night's sleep doesn't leave Ibrahim in high spirits. At breakfast, the fry-up falls flat for some of the guests, and the feedback leaves a bitter taste in the hosts' mouths

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is distressed when Lisa signs up for the opportunity to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, but a cunning strategy using reverse psychology to discourage her daughter from carrying out her plan goes badly awry

programme.title: Ackley Bridge
programme.desc: Tahir's world is turned upside down when Hayley reveals that she's pregnant. Fizza and Kayla confront Johnny over his lies, but the backlash results in a rift between the two girls. Meanwhile, Johnny is torn over whether or not to marry Rose

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Nancy questions George's ex-boyfriend Dean over his intentions, and Tony is shocked to discover that Diane has cancelled her scan

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Olympic cyclist Victoria Pendleton visits Wood Green animal charity, keen to find a dog she can co-parent with her mother. She meets Leilo, but the Rhodesian ridgeback's long-term medical needs require serious consideration. Lovebirds Shai and Orin's try to hit it off with Polo the lurcher, while Zoe the beagle meets the Forristal family

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall continue their quest to curry favour with omnipotent Taskmaster Greg Davies. Lee attacks a toy vole and Sarah invents a sweet dressing for an unusual salad. Meanwhile, Charlotte provides surprising sound effects for a set of Russian dolls. Greg's assistant Alex Horne takes notes, records times and offers the contestants some much-needed moral support

programme.title: Frank of Ireland
programme.desc: Aine tells Frank that things are getting serious between her and Peter-Brian, prompting him to join forces with Doofus to expose the object of her affection. Meanwhile, Mary takes on a tenant or two to help cover the mortgage. Comedy, with Brian Gleeson, Domhnall Gleeson, Pom Boyd, Sarah Greene and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson meets 21-year-old YouTuber Jay from London, who has no problem messaging women online but cannot make connections in real life, and 28-year-old Victoria from Liverpool, who is looking for her very own Xena, Warrior Princess. Will the back-to-basics approach of Naked Attraction help either of them find what they're looking for?

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Self-made millionaire Delia is looking for a man to build a future with - could City trader Mark be the one? Bengy has a trauma from his past he is reluctant to share - luckily Lara is a caring soul with a listening ear. Butcher Nick is excited at the thought of meeting someone, even though he admits he doesn't know how to speak to women

programme.title: Trip Hazard: My Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Rosie Jones takes fellow comedian and broadcaster Jamali Maddix to the East Anglian city of Norwich. The pair learn an 18th-century folk dance from a bunch of local men who are keeping the tradition of molly dancing alive, tour the city's epic cathedral and watch tiny trains go round and round at the UK's largest indoor model attraction. The duo also taste a variety of wines at a nearby vineyard and sober up in time to attend a blacksmithing course, during which they heat and hammer metal under the guidance of a local artisan. Narrated by Olivia Colman

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: How to Save a Grand in 24 Hours

programme.title: Second Hand for 50 Grand
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a company that tracks down luxury second-hand items, going the extra mile to hunt down the exact handbags, watches and jewellery on their clients' wish-lists and find out the personal stories behind them. Window cleaner Grant's dad wants to buy him a Cartier watch as a thank you for looking after him. Rebecca asks head of handbags Reece to scour the globe for an exact match to a stolen Prada bag gifted by her late mother. Meanwhile, firefighter Hywell has received a watch from his Grandad. If the team can prove that it's genuine, then Hywell's life is about to change for ever

programme.desc: A couple from London, and a couple from Consett start off with £100,000 and must avoid wrong answers or bundles of their cash will fall through trapdoors

programme.desc: Debra learns two of her friends have been to see a marriage counsellor, and tries to convince Ray they should seek professional advice to resolve their relationship problems. Ray Romano stars

programme.desc: When Ally's teacher overhears Ray commenting about the children's excessive workload, she invites him to address the curriculum review board and gives him a mountain of material for review and evaluation. Ray Romano stars

programme.desc: The shrink resents his lack of privacy now that he has to share his apartment with his father and Daphne, while Roz debates the virtues of human contact. Kelsey Grammer stars

Rosie takes Jenny on a horse ride along the waterfront, and they take to the skies on the world's fastest zip wire. As the sun sets, they meet a coast craft expert, who teaches them essential survival skills on one of the island's many picturesque beaches - and it's quickly evident they'd not last more than few hours if left to fend for themselves. However, further rifts appear in the group when Vicky wants to discuss Geordie icons

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the night of the final dinner party in Newcastle and the turn of hotel administrator Vicky to entertain her guests. The theme of negativity continues as mum-of-three Claire and Liz both take the comedy promoter to task over his questionable sense of humour, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is revealed

programme.desc: A lawyer-turned-florist gets embroiled in a murder investigation when her friend becomes the prime suspect for the crime. Whodunit, starring Brooke Shields

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: The Llewellyn family from Enfield swap homes, budgets and lives with the Hornans from Rickmansworth, and although they live just 20 miles away from each other, their financial circumstances are worlds apart. The Hornans have a lifestyle that many would envy, with good jobs, a large four-bedroom house, annual holidays to Italy and a weekly budget of about £2,300. The Llewellyns, meanwhile, live in a three-bedroom maisonette and get by on just £97 a week

programme.title: 5 News at 5

programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: Raven chicks are born in the tower for the first time in 30 years - but only one of the newborn birds can stay, and ravenmaster Chris faces the tough decision of choosing one to keep and finding suitable homes for all the others. The tower director prepares to retire after 15 years, and takes a moment to enjoy his final gun salute, while AJ Clarke, only the second woman to join the Yeoman warders, embarks on a fitness regime that soon leaves her in need of a new uniform. Plus, a look at the story of the time the future Queen Elizabeth I was imprisoned in the tower for plotting to overthrow her sister, Queen Mary

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The firearms team are deployed to the address of a man allegedly armed with a gun who is threatening to harm himself or provoke a police shooting. In Mansfield, Spencer and Rob tackle a man in the street who is suspected of carrying a knife and making threats to stab his own mother, and officers deal with a driver who struggles to remember his own name

programme.title: Here Come the Gypsies!
programme.desc: In Hampshire, it's the day of the renowned Cooper horse drive, and hundreds of Gypsies gather to buy and sell horses and ride out together through the New Forest. Among those hoping to sell horses at the Cooper drive are two horse traders from very different backgrounds, veteran horse dealer Beb and his direct competition, Sophie, who is determined to strike a blow for the women in a trade dominated by men

programme.title: Police Raids: Caught by Surprise
programme.desc: Cameras follow enforcement agencies carrying out raids across Britain, as they take drastic action against fraudsters, counterfeiters and criminals. A specialist counterfeit raid team targets businesses suspected of dealing fake goods, and energy theft enforcers raid a Liverpool takeaway which has registered a sudden drop in gas usage

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Security is called after a patient suspected of having Covid-19 ties wires around his door handles in protest after being asked not to roam around the department, while 25-year-old Chelsea arrives in resus by air ambulance after being hit by a car while on a night out. In minors, 68-year-old Roger has managed to accidentally swallow disinfectant and is worried he's caused serious internal damage, while a team tries to revive a patient who is having a cardiac arrest

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Eight Days That Made Rome
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes explores the day in 80AD when the Colosseum opened its gates for the first time. For new emperor Titus, the spectacular games and events were an opportunity to win over the people and secure his place on the imperial throne, but why did the Romans - cultured and civilised in so many ways - enjoy witnessing such brutality and bloodletting? Bettany travels across the Roman world in a bid to find answers. Dramatisations featuring Sam Barriscale, Oliver Monaghan and Paul Lacoux bring the key moments to life

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Seventeenth-century Dutch painter Jan Vermeer, the lowly son of an innkeeper and art dealer, lived an uneventful life, leaving fewer than 40 authenticated works and dying unknown outside his home town. Tim Marlow investigates how his talent came to be regarded as highly as Rembrandt's, and examines the simple domestic scenes that led to his posthumous rise to fame

programme.desc: Ben journeys to the Ozark National Forest in Arkansas, to live with master craftsman Robert, learning why this 70-year-old former medical student ditched his education for America's counterculture 20 years ago, bought 200 acres of land deep in the woods, and raised a family of six children. Ben sees how far-reaching Robert's skills are, including cabin-making techniques dating back to the 13th century, and how his family have supported him in his dream

programme.title: Eight Days That Made Rome
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes recalls the time that marked Rome's symbolic break with its 1,000-year pagan past - the day in 337AD that Emperor Constantine the Great was baptised a Christian. It was a moment of profound significance not just for the empire, but for the history of the world and one of its major religions. Constantine was one of the last great Roman emperors to rule over a united empire, giving it a new capital - Constantinople, today known as Istanbul - a city which would one day eclipse Rome as the greatest city on Earth. Dramatisations featuring Ian Beattie and Gary Finan bring the key moments to life

programme.desc: A journey down the mighty Hudson river, weaving 315 miles through some of New York state's most stunning natural landscapes, and ending at the Statue of Liberty. The trek begins at the Adirondack Mountains, where the forested slopes are covered with trees turned a thousand brilliant colours in the autumn sunshine. Bill Nighy narrates

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A look at the final years of Winston Churchill, whose reckless behaviour threatened to endanger his legacy. On the French Riviera, the British bulldog was looking more like a jet-setting playboy. His grandiose attitude was at odds with an increasingly forward looking Britain. However, when the end finally came, his state funeral was one of the biggest Britain had ever seen

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 80s Songs
programme.desc: Jenny Powell narrates this look back at the era of Bros, Belinda Carlisle and Bomb the Bass. It was also the time when Kylie Minogue went from soap icon to pop star. Toyah Willcox, Paul Gambaccini, Cheryl Baker and Sam Fox add their thoughts on the year when Fairground Attraction had a Perfect hit, the Hollies were back in the charts, and Yazz and the Plastic Population breathed new life into 1980 song The Only Way Is Up

programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the career of Kylie Minogue and her 50th birthday. Featuring archive footage and a soundtrack of Kylie's music

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben travels to New Zealand's North Island, where he meets a young nomadic family led by Amber and Andy, who spend their life exploring the country's wild landscapes. He hears how the family's lives changed forever after one fateful day, how they swapped the stress of the city for a life on the open road, the price they paid for chasing their dream and how the horrors of the past still haunt them today

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Deep into the jungle mountains of Thailand on the border with Myanmar and far off any conventional map, Ben spends time with 40-year-old French-Canadian Julien, who has been a Buddhist monk for almost half his life. Living in a remote monastery, Ben learns how and why this former teenage student from the West stripped away all complications of a modern life for a primitive Eastern and religious existence, and how this choice affected his family. The adventurer observes how Julien has created a bespoke way of life, which includes giving back to the remote hill-tribe communities in his region

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow profiles scientist, engineer, inventor and painter Leonardo da Vinci, whose extraordinary artistic genius gave rise to masterpieces including the Mona Lisa, the Annunciation and the Last Supper. Breaking new ground in portraiture and historical imagery, this giant of the Italian Renaissance used his wide-ranging skills to make a unique contribution to the development of European art

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton ride to the rescue of a couple who are having trouble selling their converted chapel in Yeovil, Somerset. Happily, a lick of paint and the eviction of a resident rat help transform the dingy interior into a cool, airy space

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut

programme.title: The Last Blitzkrieg (1959)
programme.desc: The son of a Nazi general is selected for a secret undercover mission. He and his men disguise themselves as American soldiers and go behind the Allied lines, with the intention of carrying out acts of sabotage and undermining enemy morale. Second World War drama, starring Van Johnson and Kerwin Mathews

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther (1975)
programme.desc: The inept Inspector Clouseau sets out to unmask a notorious international jewel thief believed to be behind the theft of a priceless diamond - but anarchy, as ever, follows wherever he goes. Blake Edwards' comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Christopher Plummer, Catherine Schell, Herbert Lom, Burt Kwouk and Graham Stark

programme.title: Warcraft (2016)
programme.desc: A kingdom stands on the brink of war when it is invaded by a vast horde of creatures who have travelled through a portal from their dying world. As dark magic works its influence on the world, two leaders from either side are set on a collision course with each other as they strive to protect their people. Fantasy adventure based on the best-selling computer game, starring Travis Fimmel, Paula Patton and Ben Foster

programme.title: The Drop (2014)
programme.desc: A Brooklyn bartender secretly provides a service delivering shipments of money to local gangsters. His criminal connections lead to his involvement in a robbery that goes disastrously wrong and digs up the long-buried secrets from his neighbourhood's past. Crime drama based on a short story by Dennis Lehane, starring Tom Hardy, Noomi Rapace and James Gandolfini in his final film role

programme.title: The Crying Game (1992)
programme.desc: An IRA member holds a British soldier hostage. The pair form an unlikely bond - so when the situation ends in tragedy, the guilt-ridden terrorist sets out to find his former prisoner's lover. But romance is soon on the cards, with devastating results. Neil Jordan's thriller, starring Stephen Rea, Jaye Davidson and Miranda Richardson

programme.title: Gemma Bovery (2014)
programme.desc: An Englishwoman goes to live in the French village that was the setting for Flaubert's novel Madame Bovary. As her marriage begins to fall apart, she begins to see parallels between herself and the book's heroine, and finds herself at a crossroads in her life when an old flame reappears. Comedy drama based on the graphic novel by Posy Simmonds, starring Gemma Arterton and Fabrice Luchini

programme.title: Alvarez Kelly (1966)
programme.desc: A cynical, mercenary cattle drover sets out to deliver a herd to soldiers at a Union base during the American Civil War. During the journey, he is kidnapped by a Confederate colonel, who hopes to persuade him to help steal the animals and take them deep into rebel territory. Western, starring William Holden, Richard Widmark and Janice Rule

programme.title: The Blue Dahlia (1946)
programme.desc: A war-weary pilot returns home from service in Europe, but his welcome is far from warm. Not only must he deal with the news of his wife's infidelities, but he also finds himself accused of her murder. However, the wife of his dead spouse's lover is on hand to help him prove his innocence. Thriller, written by Raymond Chandler and starring Alan Ladd, Veronica Lake, William Bendix and Doris Dowling

programme.title: Border River (1954)
programme.desc: A Confederate officer takes part in a daring mission to buy weapons to aid in the hard-fought battles against the Yankees, but things go awry, forcing his one true love to save him. Western, starring Joel McCrea, Yvonne de Carlo, Pedro Armendariz and Howard Petrie

programme.title: The Rare Breed (1966)
programme.desc: An English widow decides to fulfil her cattle farmer husband's final wish of introducing the Hereford breed to America. She finds a cattleman in Texas willing to help, but first she and her daughter must transport their prize bull across the wilderness, with the aid of a sceptical ranch hand. Romantic comedy Western, starring Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2 (2017)
programme.desc: Having settled their differences, Brad and Dusty's newfound friendship is put to the test when their respective fathers - one gentle, the other overly macho - arrive for the Christmas holidays, forcing them to change their plans. What starts as a break at a fun-filled trip to a luxury resort turns into something far more chaotic. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg, Mel Gibson and John Lithgow

programme.title: The Girl in the Spider's Web (2018)
programme.desc: Swedish hacker Lisbeth Salander is hired by computer genius Frans Balder to retrieve Firefall, a programme capable of accessing the world's nuclear codes that he developed for the National Security Agency. Though Salander manages to find Firefall, it's not long before she's fighting for her life against mercenaries. Thriller, starring Claire Foy and Sylvia Hoeks

programme.title: Savage (2018)
programme.desc: Wang Kanghao, a police officer from a desolate town in the foothills of Mount Baekdu, sets out on a one-man mission to bring three criminals to justice after they murder his partner. Action thriller, starring Chang Chen. In Mandarin with English subtitles

programme.title: 127 Hours (2010)
programme.desc: A mountain climber gets stuck in an isolated canyon when a boulder crushes his arm. Remaining trapped for five days, he comes to realise no one is going to save him, and that survival will depend on a particularly drastic course of action. Danny Boyle's fact-based drama, with James Franco and Kate Mara

programme.title: The Duel at Silver Creek (1952)
programme.desc: A gambler goes after the gang of claim jumpers who killed his father, and joins forces with an injured marshal who also wants the criminals brought to justice. However, their partnership is tested when a devious femme fatale enters their lives. Don Siegel's Western, starring Audie Murphy, Stephen McNally and Faith Domergue

programme.title: Pimpernel Smith (1941)
programme.desc: An unassuming English professor working on an archaeological dig in Germany leads a double life helping enemies of the Nazi regime escape the country. Second World War adventure based on The Scarlet Pimpernel, directed by and starring Leslie Howard, with Francis L Sullivan, Mary Morris, Hugh McDermott, Raymond Huntley and Manning Whiley

programme.title: O.S.S. (1946)
programme.desc: Alan Ladd is on fine form as a tough spy sent to France to collect vital information shortly before D-Day. His team of expert operatives includes a strong-minded female agent - but sparks fly when the pair begin to work together, a situation which looks likely to lead to a crisis of conscience. By-the-numbers World War Two adventure, with Geraldine Fitzgerald, Patric Knowles and Richard Benedict

programme.title: Billion Dollar Brain (1967)
programme.desc: Former secret agent Harry Palmer comes out of retirement to take a mysterious canister to Finland, and ends up embroiled in an American megalomaniac's bid to take over the world. Espionage thriller, directed by Ken Russell and starring Michael Caine, Oscar Homolka and Karl Malden

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Total Recall (2012)
programme.desc: A man living in a bleak future years after a nuclear war has fake memories of being a secret agent implanted into his brain. However, the procedure uncovers the fact that he really is a spy with his memory erased, and he is forced to become a fugitive from the totalitarian government. Sci-fi thriller remake, with Colin Farrell, Kate Beckinsale and Jessica Biel

programme.title: Sabotage (2014)
programme.desc: The members of an elite Drug Enforcement Administration team secretly keep the millions of dollars they find during the raid. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Sam Worthington

programme.title: The Goldbergs
