programme.desc: Wealthy 24-year-old pharmacist Navid spends time with Queen and Shaun in west London, who are struggling financially despite both holding down jobs

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Staffing problems hit the department as several nurses call in sick, and young manager Tom has to use his charm to get the team to commit to working extra shifts. Paramedics are concerned about a family that were involved in a road traffic accident, and consultant Julian treats a critically ill patient with undiagnosed symptoms

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: Mobile operations manager Jane is called to Burnham, Buckinghamshire, where a van has struck a bridge, and it is up to her to assess whether any significant damage has been caused to the railway line that runs over it. When a train breaks down on platform 15 of Reading station, staff are under pressure to identify and rectify the issue as quickly as possible to avoid any widespread delays, but fixing a fault with the brakes proves to be very complex

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Yorkshire police forces tackling an ever-more sophisticated criminal fraternity from the cities to the Dales. Police from the north and west of the historic county crack down on drug-addled drivers, and it is North Yorkshire's Roads Policing Group that faces the toughest challenge when a convicted drug dealer leads officers on a 140mph chase on one of the UK's busiest motorways. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: West Yorkshire officers take action against a teenage driver after he leads them on a high-speed chase across Roundhay Park in Leeds, while the cops also face a battle to keep up with uninsured drivers who flout the law without fear of consequence

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team closes in on a suspected petrol thief, stops a motorist with a stash of suspicious goods in his boot, and tracks a motorist who heads to the fair after ditching his car. The police also have an appointment with a drink-driver who crashed into a doctor's surgery, and the owner of an uninsured car tests the officers' patience to the limit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A driver mounts pavements, bumps into cars and collides with an ambulance as he tries to escape officers during a chase through the streets of Ripley in Derbyshire. An out-of-control car crashes into an interceptor's vehicle, and a helicopter is called in when a driver tries to lose his pursuers by taking the chase off-road

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drink-driver is involved in a crash, a van full of criminals loses control in a high-speed pursuit, and the police helicopter is involved in a lengthy manhunt. Officers also deal with trouble on the streets of Derbyshire, and pursue a motorist who thinks he can outrun the law

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: The team are facing one of the busiest days in Barnsley Casualty's history, and the pressure mounts on staff members as patients await beds to become available, so self-named Emergency Clown Sister Jane helps to give the younger nurses a moral boost during this difficult period. Meanwhile, consultant doctor Jane treats 10-year-old Oliver, who suffers from a rare condition called Angelman Syndrome

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Karl and Susan are put in a position where they have to follow up on their promise to collaborate on the book. Elsewhere, Terese is concerned by Paul's fixation on finances

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: After another medical incident, Christian again loses confidence and ends up in a brawl with Lewis. Marilyn visits John, worried about how he is doing after Susie conned him

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits by the Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following Britons living the high life on a low budget in Blackpool, one of the country's favourite resorts, from holiday-makers to those who have made the Lancashire town their home. Entertainer Simon Green - aka Betty Legs Diamond - talks about his life as a drag queen, and Scottish sisters Agnes and Margaret get more than they bargained for as part of their holiday package. Meanwhile, Jamie Diggins, who works as an estate agent for caravans, takes delivery of a static home that costs an amazing £280,000

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: With the computer system down, the staff resort to a whiteboard to keep track of everyone. Patients include an elderly man due to fly to Cyprus in two days, a former miner with breathing difficulties, a youngster with a footballing injury and a case of suspected meningitis. Plus, volunteer Jane Allen struggles when tasked with stashing a stationery delivery in the quiet room

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Thirty-eight-year-old Lesley is rushed in when her heart stops while she is driving to work, leaving Dr Morris battle to resuscitate her and investigate why a normally fit and well woman with no known medical problems would suffer such an attack. Abigail, aged 20, is treated for a painful neck injury caused by a riding fall, and 28-year-old Laura is brought in having a severe asthma attack. It is clear to Dr Fawcett she is deteriorating fast and that her heart could stop at any moment

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Security is called after a patient suspected of having Covid-19 ties wires around his door handles in protest after being asked not to roam around the department, while 25-year-old Chelsea arrives in resus by air ambulance after being hit by a car while on a night out. In minors, 68-year-old Roger has managed to accidentally swallow disinfectant and is worried he's caused serious internal damage, while a team tries to revive a patient who is having a cardiac arrest

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Paramedic Jack attends the scene of a double stabbing in Birmingham, where two neighbours have been attacked. Plus, Ambulance Control receive an emergency call reporting a man trapped under a bus

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at how people buy, sell and market sex. A disparate group of relatively new recruits to Britain's flourishing and fast-growing porn industry reveals what life is really like when trying to make a living in the adult movie industry

programme.title: Feeders
programme.desc: Part two of two. In Tampa, Florida, cameras focus on 32-stone Leighton and her flatmate Ivy, who weighs in at 41 stone. Plus, on the West Coast, we meet 34-stone Caiti Dee

programme.title: The Disappearance
programme.desc: Susan and Charles focus their investigation on one suspect, and a new clue proves a turning point in getting closer to the truth

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Karl and Susan are put in a position where they have to follow up on their promise to collaborate on the book. Elsewhere, Terese is concerned by Paul's fixation on finances

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: After another medical incident, Christian again loses confidence and ends up in a brawl with Lewis. Marilyn visits John, worried about how he is doing after Susie conned him

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Eight more privileged youngsters spend a week on the breadline, including Maria - daughter of Russian multi-millionaires - who meets Becky and Mohammed in Croydon

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: The team are facing one of the busiest days in Barnsley Casualty's history, and the pressure mounts on staff members as patients await beds to become available, so self-named Emergency Clown Sister Jane helps to give the younger nurses a moral boost during this difficult period. Meanwhile, consultant doctor Jane treats 10-year-old Oliver, who suffers from a rare condition called Angelman Syndrome

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: When the Beast from the East and storm Emma collide, Paddington's managers debate whether to close the station completely, something that has happened on very few occasions since World War II. There is excitement among the staff as the Duke and Duchess of Sussex board a train to Cardiff, but a rail defect at Didcot threatens to upset their journey

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The officers deal with a number of uninsured drivers, including one who leads them on a 35-minute chase and another who flees the scene of a rush-hour crash, earning himself a full-scale investigation for his trouble. Then in Bradford, a crackdown on road offences leads to the officers nabbing another insurance avoider, but tensions run high as a result

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: It is estimated that more than a million vehicles in Britain are fitted with cloned number plates as criminals who switch them to pass by police cameras undetected. On the outskirts of Bradford, a suspected stolen car using cloned plates crashes after running a red light, leaving the occupants of another car with serious injuries, leaving officers to deal with the aftermath, while a manhunt is launched for the offenders

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jason heads to a Christmas party that has turned into a full-blown riot, while Adam and Nick catch a drunken woman giving her daughter a lift to the shops. Plus, Kev is seconds away from disaster when he places himself in the path of danger to prevent a car from becoming a fireball

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A runaway suspect puts Gary's life in danger, Scott and Adam discover a huge stash of drugs in the boot of a car, and officers are called to a New Year's Eve pub brawl. Plus, Ady catches a car thief, and five police vehicles are involved in a motorway chase

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Scott and Dave use GPS technology to track a pair of mobile-phone thieves, and a car crashes into a house during the Christmas period. Plus, Nick pursues a criminal gang, Vicky deals with a van containing suspicious-looking scrap, and Jason contends with his own traffic nightmare

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Barnsley Hospital treats the largest number of patients in a single shift in its history, including a man being rushed in with a suspected brain injury. Health care assistant Sharon Bailey and volunteer Jane Allen try to keep their colleagues' spirits up with tea and cake, while a nine-year-old girl in the paediatric triage area does not want to stay overnight and a strange smell emerges from the lost property box

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: After reading her diary, Harlow realises her romantic experiences are weirdly similar to those of Prue. The Kennedys are shocked when Bea decides to investigate a book deal

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean brings Mackenzie to her scheduled abortion, worried about Ari who is out of the loop. Lewis considers filing a report against Christian

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan come to the aid of a compulsive buyer in Morecambe whose semi-detached bungalow has become overrun with junk, dust and grime

programme.title: Extreme Nightmare Tenants
programme.desc: Case of landlords with nightmare tenants and the difficulties they had in evicting them, including Yossi Harel, who rented out his family home in north London to take a job in Israel. He thought he had the perfect tenants - a teacher and his family - but before long they stopped paying rent. Plus, a builder who came up against his tenant and her aggressive boyfriend and a lawyer tasked with evicting an anti-social tenant in Blackpool

programme.title: Watchmen (2009)
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, former superheroes driven into retirement by public outcry are confronted with the murder of one of their number. As they face the possibility of a conspiracy to eliminate them, they must contend with a world edging closer to the brink of nuclear war. Sci-fi drama, based on Alan Moore and Dave Gibbons' graphic novel, starring Patrick Wilson, Jackie Earle Haley, Malin Akerman and Billy Crudup

However, it was all a lie. Within weeks, Mitesh's double life as a gay man had become apparent to the police. Far from being a committed husband and pillar of the Hindu community, he had been plotting an affair with his lover in Australia

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres and Sloane run protection detail for a US Senator Phillips in Afghanistan, but are summoned home to the States after a near-fatal altercation leaves the politician's son in a critical condition

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The unit begins a sting operation to bring down a drug-running syndicate based at a Norfolk civilian marina. Torres and Bishop go undercover as a criminal couple available for hire as part of the mission

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the discovery of four bodies in a jeweller's shop. Suspicion soon falls on the husband of one of the victims, who is revealed to have changed his identity to escape a shady past. The shop's security tapes are subsequently discovered in his flat, but the defendant surprises everyone by insisting on representing himself in court - and makes a big impression on the jury

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Animal rights activists are implicated in the death of an Aids researcher killed by a bite from an infected monkey, and use the ensuing court case to drum up support for their cause. As events unfold, McCoy and Carmichael find themselves debating ethics with lawyers who argue the protection of animal life is a valid defence in a murder case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis uncovers evidence of police corruption that puts the DA's office into conflict with an ambitious judge, and Briscoe comes under investigation for stealing evidence from a police lockup. Crime drama, with Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a Hispanic man found dead from a severe chest trauma after being involved in a staged car accident with two other illegal immigrants - and soon find evidence linking similar incidents with the same employer, chiropractor and insurance adjuster. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a student who proves to be the estranged son of a powerful real-estate tycoon. The finger of blame points to a mystery woman seen with the victim outside the college, and when tracked down, she claims to be his sister. However, Briscoe is not convinced, and suspects an extortion scheme

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An angry woman who blames her former daughter-in-law's new husband for her son's death hires a hitman to exact retribution. Briscoe and Curtis manage to get their hands on the contract killer but fail to understand why his customer has gone to such extreme lengths

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Lieutenant JAG lawyer - who appeared to have a happy life - is found dead by her parents in an apparent suicide. Gibbs and the team interview family and friends from her past and present in a bid to unravel the facts

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee and Torres visit the home of a high-school student who witnessed a hit-and-run, but her parents flee with their daughter, leaving NCIS in the lurch

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: The detectives continue to investigate the case of the missing diamonds, and the task force executes a major drug bust

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren reflects on his youthful sporting endeavours as he tries to track down the killer of a high-school basketball star who had gone missing and the private investigator hired to find him. Interviews with his classmates and friends reveal shady links to gambling syndicates. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames' investigation into the disappearance of a book-keeper leads back to the death of her brother, a hitman, two years previously. The evidence seems to point to an imprisoned mobster - until a second body is discovered and the case becomes less clear-cut. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: The spirit of a Native American inhabits the body of a troubled teenager and wreaks revenge on the killers of the boy's father. Juliette's rampage gets her in trouble with the law, while Monroe and Rosalee attempt to find a cure for her before it is too late. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a hitchhiker, Nick and Hank uncover a link to a Wesen rite of passage. Nick turns to Adalind for help with Juliette, Renard's phantom pains after his 'death' take a strange turn, and Prince Kenneth has plans to take advantage of it all. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A string of murders triggers fears a Jack the Ripper copycat is operating in Portland. Meanwhile, Adalind and Rosalee work together in a desperate bid to improve Juliette's circumstances. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.desc: A restaurant owner is beaten to death and Briscoe and Green's investigation leads them to a gang of thrill-seeking teenagers who tried to steal from the victim but ended up killing him. The ensuing case leaves McCoy with a dilemma over whether the accused are old enough to face the death penalty

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A janitor is found murdered, leading the team to a schizophrenic student they discover has been part of an experimental drug programme. Though all evidence points to the youngster, it transpires that he had no motive to commit the crime and the police soon turn their attentions to a psychiatrist. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are convinced that former career criminal Cally Lonegan has killed his business partner who had been stealing company money. However, their suspect has a cast iron alibi - he is a Mob informant and at the time of the murder was being followed by the FBI. The case takes a more complicated turn when an eyewitness is found dead and the detectives discover Lonegan has a twin brother

Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Jamey Sheridan

programme.desc: Goren and his new temporary partner Bishop are assigned to investigate the death of a reporter whose lover is the prime suspect in her murder. programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Bishop try to track down a latter-day Bonnie and Clyde who have already killed nine people, including two undercover cops. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant loan officer is found murdered in the boot of her car and the trail leads to drugs and a professional basketball player, whose ties to the victim appear to extend beyond the financial deal she approved for him. Detective drama, with Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a crooked car dealer whose son is dying of leukaemia presents McCoy and Ross with a moral dilemma. His ex-wife is their prime suspect - but it transpires that the victim had regularly abused her and refused to pay child support. Drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a woman killed in what appears to be a road rage incident. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.desc: Eames and Goren's investigation into the murder of a pharmaceutical salesman found cut in half uncovers a web of corruption involving fraud, bribery, identity theft and a conspiracy to sell contaminated blood. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: My Violent Child
programme.desc: Documentary following therapist Mandy Saligari as she takes on some of the UK's most violent and difficult children, and tries to figure out what makes their behaviour so extreme. In the first edition, she heads to South Wales, where she deals with one of the most troubling cases she has ever seen. Jack is just months away from turning ten, the criminal age of responsibility, and is at risk of being locked up due to how badly he terrorises his dad. In addition to this, he has been expelled from school for attacking a pupil, so Mandy uses unconventional methods in an attempt to solve his behavioural issues

programme.title: Sparks and Embers (2015)
programme.desc: A French woman living in London ends her relationship with her boyfriend when she decides to return to her own country. On the day she is due to leave, they meet again for one last goodbye. Despite knowing their break-up is for the best, both find themselves tempted to stay together - but neither feels brave enough to say it. Romantic comedy, starring Kris Marshall and Annelise Hesme

programme.title: The Loft (2014)
programme.desc: Five successful married men rent an apartment where they can carry out their extra-marital affairs in secret. The arrangement works well until they find the corpse of a beautiful woman handcuffed to a bed - but which of them is the killer, and how will the grisly discovery affect their friendship? Thriller, with Karl Urban, James Marsden and Wentworth Miller

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. World-famous Danish eatery Noma sets up a pop-up restaurant in the ballroom and Claridge's chefs are faced with providing Nordic-foraged food to thousands of guests who have paid £195 each. A couple fly in from Atlanta for the wedding of their dreams and a butler prepares a suite for one of the hotel's most valued guests, bringing furniture, hat boxes and 20 suits out of storage for just one night

programme.desc: Charles Kriel's fight for social justice as he travels across America, where he discovers a powerful organisation with ties to the heart of the White House

programme.title: Urban Hymn (2015)
programme.desc: A teenager is encouraged by her social worker to use singing as an escape route from her troubled personal life. She soon finds her loyalties divided between the fresh start music provides for her and the influence of her possessive and volatile best friend. Drama, starring Letitia Wright, Shirley Henderson and Ian Hart

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: IBA Unlicensed Legends
programme.desc: Big characters. Great fights. Never seen before amazing action from the ring. Bouts from IBA Boxing's most notorious fighters bring their best game for these high-octane events

programme.title: The Cat Gang (1959)
programme.desc: A gang of children is always hanging around a harbour - although the customs officers are always trying to get rid of them. When the youngsters stumble on some shady characters behaving suspiciously, they end up uncovering a smuggling plot. Children's crime drama, starring Francesca Annis and John Pike

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef explores quirky homespun food trends by visiting a a shop that creates custom preserves, and a home-based salmon smokehouse

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef enjoys a champagne afternoon tea, before she discovers the secret behind delicious fish and chips

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Everyone thinks a Bigfoot has stolen Lawrence's special shell when it disappears

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra and his friends take part in the Island Cup competition

programme.title: Zeek's Animal World
programme.desc: Follow alien robot Zeek as he tries to find out some fascinating facts about our animal kingdom

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Cassy, Vern & Gus are gifted students who go to an enchanted school to learn about magic. After receiving a book named UBOS (Ultimate Book of Spells) they soon begin their journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Part one of two. A tornado sweeps up the Drakkar and takes it to China - where a general arrests the Vikings, demanding to know how they made their ship fly

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Part two of two. The vikings' attempt to make it back to the coast is thwarted - but Vic helps them escape by coming up with a way to teach the general to fly

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef explores quirky homespun food trends by visiting a a shop that creates custom preserves, and a home-based salmon smokehouse

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The chef enjoys a champagne afternoon tea, before she discovers the secret behind delicious fish and chips

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike is having financial trouble, so Laura decides to help out. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike's van and where he can park it interferes in the development of his relationship with Laura. Judi Dench and Michael Williams star

programme.title: Charlton Heston Presents the Bible
programme.desc: The renowned actor serves as storyteller an ancient Roman amphitheatre and other locales in Israel provide the settings, bringing the King James text to life

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams recounts the extraordinary tale of a Chicago-style turf-war gunfight on the Hampshire-Wiltshire border during the Second World War and Ennis Smith reveals how she broke the rules to marry her soldier boyfriend Clarence

programme.title: London's Screen Archives Presents
programme.desc: A special compilation of historical short films from Film London's London Screen Archives. London Ambulance Service Launch at County Hall. Life in Belmont, Sutton

programme.title: Miracle in Soho (1957)
programme.desc: A cynical road-repairer falls for the alluring charms of an Italian girl working as a barmaid, only to discover she and her family are planning to move to Canada. Romantic drama written by Emeric Pressburger, starring John Gregson, Belinda Lee and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Heavens Above! (1963)
programme.desc: An idealistic vicar working as a prison chaplain is accidentally reassigned to a conservative middle-class village. He immediately puts his progressive ideas into practice, but finds his genuine belief in charity does not go down well with his snobbish congregation. Satirical comedy, starring Peter Sellers and Eric Sykes

programme.title: The Kid From Canada (1958)
programme.desc: A boy visits his family in the Scottish Highlands, where his boastfulness gets him into trouble during a horse riding trip. Family drama, with Christopher Braden and Bernard Braden

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Ray Townsend meets a bamboo expert during an enforced pit-stop in a Japanese lay-by. Back at Kew, Phil Griffiths has his work cut out creating a display featuring a tower of hundreds of pumpkins, and the Gardens' scholarship art student exhibits her intricate botanical designs. Alan Titchmarsh narrates

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Randall Keynes, the great-great-grandson of Charles Darwin, visits arboretum head Tony Kirkham in his search for a particular species of rhododendron to restock the naturalist's former home at Down House, and an archaeological dig poses a few delicate questions

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Sail the Saronic and Ionian Greek islands with Peter Maneas as he explores their rich history, culture, cuisine, and people as well as their hidden secrets and surprises

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: 16th-century Europe was a hotbed of tense international intrigue. Mary Stuart and Elizabeth I confront one another on matters religious, political and personal

programme.title: The Escort (2015)
programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. A trip to Hong Kong organised by her parents opens her eyes to more experiences - both good and bad. Australian drama, starring Glory Annen and Jody Hanson

programme.title: Sparks and Embers (2015)
programme.desc: A French woman living in London ends her relationship with her boyfriend when she decides to return to her own country. On the day she is due to leave, they meet again for one last goodbye. Despite knowing their break-up is for the best, both find themselves tempted to stay together - but neither feels brave enough to say it. Romantic comedy, starring Kris Marshall and Annelise Hesme

programme.title: The Crouches
programme.desc: The family are horrified when Uncle Sonny makes an impromptu visit from Jamaica, and set about trying to come up with ways of getting him to leave - but when a pep talk fails and he brings a goat into their home, they are left with no option but to call on Grandma Sylvia for help. Mona Hammond and Rudolph Walker star

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael throws a fancy dress party at his house to celebrate the 33rd anniversary of the film Zulu, but the mood turns sour when the Monopoly board comes out

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The street rallies round to help as Mrs Hugett recuperates from a bout of alcohol poisoning, and Dirk is convinced Len the Gardener is trying to murder him

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Dirk is increasingly paranoid over Len's attempts to kill him, seeking solace in Jack's house, and Jimmy finds himself in huge amounts of debt to Mick and Keith as his drink problem grows

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Joe returns to the street after having a lobotomy, while Mrs Hugett comes up with a plan to get money out of Jack. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell
